headline: My contributions to the MCP (Model Context Protocol) ecosystem, Agentic payments, Google (web.dev) and Mozilla (MDN engine) repositories, plus proposals to the GitHub service itself
description: Yuri Shapkarin contributions to major web development platforms, including Model Context Protocol (MCP inspector repo by Agentic AI Foundation) ecosystem, Mozilla's MDN (+it's engine) and Google's web.dev, Proposals to the GitHub service itself, highlighting the impact of contributions in the open-source community.
keywords: open source contribution, gitHub, mozilla, mdn, google, web.dev, pull request, issues, javascript, web development, yari, mdn content, tab-glutton, open source, developer portfolio, community contribution
